title: A2R Computer Use Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for domain-specific workflow plugin manifests. Each plugin bundles golden paths, cookbooks, prompts, and policy overrides for a particular integration target (GitHub, Gmail, Notion, etc).

description.description: Short human-readable description of what this plugin does

families.description: Adapter families this plugin is compatible with

modes.description: Routing modes this plugin operates in

permissions.description: Capability permissions this plugin requires at runtime

golden_paths.description: IDs of golden paths this plugin exercises (e.g. 'GP-01', 'GP-09')

cookbooks.description: IDs of cookbooks bundled with this plugin (must match files in cookbooks/ subdir)

conformance_suite.description: Reference to the conformance suite used to grade this plugin (e.g. 'plugin-github-v1')

policy_profile.description: Plugin-scoped policy constraints applied on top of the global policy engine

max_destructive_actions.description: Maximum number of destructive actions allowed per session. null = no limit (not recommended for production).

requires_approval.description: If true, any destructive action must be approved by the operator before execution

allowed_domains.description: Explicit allowlist of domains this plugin may navigate to. Empty array = no domain restriction.

blocked_actions.description: Action keywords or action_type values that must always be denied for this plugin

author.description: Author or maintainer of this plugin (name, team, or email)

tags.description: Free-form tags for discovery and filtering

homepage.description: Optional URL to plugin documentation or repository

min_computer_use_version.description: Minimum A2R computer-use package version required to run this plugin

prompts.description: IDs of prompt templates bundled with this plugin (must match files in prompts/ subdir)
